description: You can execute these commands from the Cortex XSOAR CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook. After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.
name: phishlabs-global-feed

outputs.description: URL address. URL.Malicious.Vendor Vendor reporting the malicious status.
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: Description of the malicious URL. PhishLabs.URL.Data URL address.
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: URL PhishLabs ID. PhishLabs.URL.CreatedAt Date
outputs.name: PhishLabs.URL.ID

outputs.description: PhishLabs.URL.UpdatedAt Date URL update time, in PhishLabs.
outputs.name: URL creation time, in PhishLabs.

outputs.description: URL attribute name. PhishLabs.URL.Attribute.Value URL attribute value.
outputs.name: PhishLabs.URL.Attribute.Name

outputs.description: Date URL attribute creation time. PhishLabs.URL.FalsePositive
outputs.name: PhishLabs.URL.Attribute.CreatedAt

outputs.description: Whether this URL is a false positive. Domain.Name Domain name.
outputs.name: Boolean

outputs.description: Vendor reporting the malicious status. Domain.Malicious.Description Description of the malicious domain.
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: Domain name. PhishLabs.Domain.ID Domain PhishLabs ID.
outputs.name: PhishLabs.Domain.Name

outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: PhishLabs.Domain.FalsePositive Whether this domain is a false positive. File.Name

outputs.description: Full filename. File.MD5 MD5 hash of the file.
outputs.name: String
